components.name: order-card
components.purpose: Displays order summary with table number, items, status, and timestamp
components.behavior: Tappable to view order detail. Swipe for quick actions.

components.name: status-badge
components.purpose: Small colored badge showing current status of an order or item
components.behavior: Read-only indicator. Color changes based on status.

components.name: menu-item-card
components.purpose: Displays a menu item with image, name, price for selection during order creation
components.behavior: Tappable to add item to order. Shows quantity badge when added. Long-press for detail.

components.name: quantity-stepper
components.purpose: Plus/minus buttons to adjust item quantity in an order
components.behavior: Minimum 1, no maximum. Tap minus at 1 removes item from order.

components.name: kitchen-order-card
components.purpose: Kitchen-optimized order card with large text, items list, special notes, and action buttons
components.behavior: Large touch targets for busy kitchen. Single tap to change status. Shows timer since order placed.

components.name: table-card
components.purpose: Visual representation of a restaurant table with status indicator
components.behavior: Tappable to create order (if available) or view active order (if occupied).

components.name: kpi-card
components.purpose: Dashboard metric card showing label, value, and trend indicator
components.behavior: Read-only display. Optional trend arrow (up/down) with percentage.

components.name: data-table
components.purpose: Reusable table component for listing data with sortable columns and actions
components.behavior: Sortable columns, row click for detail, pagination for large datasets. Responsive: becomes card list on mobile.

components.name: permission-checklist
components.purpose: Grid of toggleable permission checkboxes for access control configuration
components.behavior: Each row is a module/permission. Toggle on/off per user. Shows default role permission vs override.

components.name: numpad
components.purpose: On-screen numeric keypad for payment amount input
components.behavior: Large touch-friendly buttons. Supports decimal input. Clear and backspace actions.

components.name: alert-card
components.purpose: Warning/notification card for low stock alerts and system notifications
components.behavior: Shows icon, message, and action link. Dismissible or persistent based on type.

components.name: search-bar
components.purpose: Text input with search icon for filtering lists and tables
components.behavior: Instant filter as user types. Clear button when text present.

components.name: date-range-picker
components.purpose: Calendar-based date range selector for filtering reports and transactions
components.behavior: Preset options (Today, This Week, This Month) + custom range picker.

components.name: recipe-header
components.purpose: Header section for recipe viewer showing dish name, image, difficulty, and cooking time
components.behavior: Read-only display. Large text optimized for kitchen viewing distance.

components.name: step-card
components.purpose: Individual cooking step with number, instruction text, and optional timer
components.behavior: Large readable text for kitchen. Optional highlight for current step.

components.name: shift-status-bar
components.purpose: Persistent bar showing active shift info: cashier name, opening balance, shift duration, running cash total
components.behavior: Always visible in waiter header when shift is active. Tappable to view shift detail or initiate close shift.

components.name: discrepancy-indicator
components.purpose: Color-coded display showing the difference between expected and actual cash at shift close
components.behavior: Auto-calculated. Green = match (±Rp1000), Yellow = minor (±Rp10000), Red = major (>Rp10000).

components.name: currency-display
components.purpose: Large formatted Rupiah amount display for payment and shift screens
components.behavior: Shows amount in large font with IDR formatting. Updates in real-time as numpad is used.

components.name: pin-input
components.purpose: Masked 4-6 digit PIN entry with numpad for cashier identity verification before shift operations
components.behavior: Shows dots for entered digits. Validates against stored PIN. 3 failed attempts locks for 5 minutes.

components.name: menu-card-large
components.purpose: Large tappable card on Dashboard Hub representing a module/feature entry point with icon, label, and description
components.behavior: Tappable to navigate to target screen. Greyed out if condition not met (e.g., no active shift for POS). Shows tooltip explaining why disabled.

components.name: warning-banner
components.purpose: Prominent fixed banner indicating a locked/one-way session (used in close shift)
components.behavior: Fixed at top. Cannot be dismissed. Clearly communicates that the user is in a closing session and cannot return to operations.

components.name: print-button
components.purpose: Button to trigger printing of transaction report or receipt via connected thermal printer
components.behavior: Tappable to send print job. Shows loading spinner while printing. Success/error toast after completion.

components.name: role-quick-access-bar
components.purpose: Persistent navigation bar shown when non-owner users access admin/shared screens (Stok, Menu, etc). Provides quick shortcuts back to Hub and to their primary workspace without navigating through multiple screens.
components.behavior: Fixed at top below header. Shows role-appropriate shortcuts. POS button requires PIN if shift is active. Always shows Back to Hub.

components.name: pin-gate-modal
components.purpose: Modal overlay requiring PIN verification before entering POS operational screens. Triggered when cashier navigates to POS from outside POS context (Hub, admin screens). Prevents unauthorized transaction manipulation during active shift.
components.behavior: Appears as modal overlay when entering POS screens from non-POS context. Does NOT appear when navigating within POS (e.g., order list to create order). Uses same PIN input as Open Shift. 3 failed attempts locks for 5 minutes and returns user to Hub.
trigger_conditions: Entering POS from admin screen (S-009, S-011, etc)
NOT triggered when navigating within POS screens

components.name: payment-success-modal
components.purpose: Full-screen success overlay after payment completion. Shows checkmark animation, transaction summary with PPN, and print receipt button.
components.behavior: Appears after successful payment confirmation. Cannot be dismissed by tapping outside. Two buttons: 'Print Struk' (sends print job) and 'Selesai' (returns to order list). Must explicitly choose an action.

components.name: order-summary-sidebar
components.purpose: Side panel for order creation (S-003) that shows selected items without covering the menu grid
components.behavior: On tablet/desktop: fixed right sidebar (300-350px). On mobile: collapsible bottom sheet — minimized shows item count + total, swipe up expands full list. Key: NEVER covers the menu grid.

components.name: export-excel-button
components.purpose: Button to export filtered transaction data to Excel (.xlsx) file download
components.behavior: Exports currently displayed/filtered data as .xlsx file. Shows loading spinner during generation. Downloads file automatically when ready. Filename format: 'Transaksi_POS_Logia_YYYY-MM-DD.xlsx'

components.name: back-button
components.purpose: Prominent back navigation button for returning from detail views to list views within the same screen
components.behavior: Positioned at top-left. Shows '← Kembali ke Daftar' text with arrow icon. Clicking returns to the list/table view within the same screen. Always visible when in detail/viewer mode.

components.name: kitchen-ready-notification
components.purpose: Real-time notification bar on waiter POS when kitchen marks order as ready. Shows table number, items, and confirm serve button.
components.behavior: Appears at top with audio chime. Multiple notifications stack. Tapping 'Sudah Diantar' dismisses and updates order status to served.

components.name: void-confirm-modal
components.purpose: Modal for voiding paid transactions with PIN verification, reason selection, and impact preview.
components.behavior: Step 1: PIN verification. Step 2: Select void type (full/partial). Step 3: Select mandatory reason. Step 4: Optional notes. Shows void amount and cash impact before confirm.

components.name: discount-picker
components.purpose: Picker/dropdown showing all active discount options with calculated preview amount for current order.
components.behavior: Shows active discounts from settings. Each option shows: name, type (% or Rp), calculated amount for current subtotal. Only one selectable. Remove button to clear.

components.name: qris-display
components.purpose: Static QRIS QR code display shown during QRIS payment. Image uploaded by owner in settings.
components.behavior: Shows QR code image at readable size. Instruction text below: 'Minta customer scan QR code ini'. If no QR uploaded, shows placeholder with link to settings.

components.name: elapsed-timer
components.purpose: Live counter showing time elapsed since order was placed. Used in kitchen and order list.
components.behavior: Counts up in mm:ss format. Green under 10 min, yellow 10-15 min, red over 15 min.

components.name: photo-upload-bukti
components.purpose: Camera/file upload component for transfer payment proof (bukti transfer). Cashier can take photo or select from gallery.
components.behavior: Tap to open camera or file picker. Shows thumbnail preview after upload. Can remove/retake. Image stored with transaction record. Viewable in transaction detail modal.

components.name: provider-qr-display
components.purpose: Display QR code image specific to the selected e-wallet provider. QR images are uploaded by owner per provider in settings.
components.behavior: After cashier selects e-wallet provider (GoPay/OVO/Dana/ShopeePay), shows the QR code image uploaded for that provider. If no QR uploaded for provider, shows instruction text instead. Instruction: 'Minta customer scan QR [Provider]'.

components.name: promo-banner-card
components.purpose: Horizontal scrollable promo card shown on order creation screen. Displays active discount/promo info and allows cashier to apply it to the order immediately.
components.behavior: Horizontally scrollable row of cards above menu grid. Each card shows promo name + type + value. Tappable to apply. Selected card gets checkmark and highlight. Tap again to remove. Only one active per order. Applied promo reflects in sidebar order summary (discount line).
